name: Jewish Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the first seven ingredients until smooth.
2. Peel and thinly slice the apples.
3. Add sugar and cinnamon to the apples.
4. Pour a thin layer of batter into the bottom of a prepared tube pan.
5. Add a layer of apples, more batter, more apples, and continue this pattern.
6. Top off with remaining batter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 45 minutes. (You may want to place a layer of aluminum foil over the top during the last 15 minutes of baking to avoid too much browning.)
